title: linum suffruticosum subsp. appressum
intro: Linum suffruticosum subsp. appressum, also known as the dwarf flax or yellow flax, is a subspecies of the Linum suffruticosum plant, a flowering plant in the family Linaceae. This plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Linum suffruticosum subsp. appressum include relieving symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, reducing inflammation and pain, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used externally or internally to promote overall health and well-being.
